description: I'm honestly glad I stepped out of the beauty community. YES I still do makeup videos here and there but I don't consider myself as a "Beauty influencer". There's just so much drama in the beauty industry, some influencers lying on how good a product is and you just don't get a genuine review anymore. And with all that you have other influencers that will speak on it just to try to make a point and try to convince the viewers that they will be telling you the truth. The beauty industry has just turned into "she said, he said" thing and a competition to see who's better, and it's sad because it takes the fun out of it. I'm just a content creator and I love that for me because I can do content with just my own life and there's no competition.

layoutDescription: Offset hero image overlapping a colored content panel; credibility strip overlaps photo edge; services in staggered two-column rhythm, not uniform cards.
antiPatterns: No food menu language. Gallery should showcase work, not template beauty shots.
photoInventory: You will receive 10 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
